name: The Meeting Room Of The Gods
description:
The meeting room is plain and very simple.  A circular table sits in
the middle of the room, lit by some unseen light source. There are many
chairs around the table, all empty.  The Immortal Board Room  is to the
north, the Sugestion's Place is to the east and  the Builder's Place is
to the west.

exits.description: The Immortal Board Room can be seen to the north.
